prose:
Frontier orbitals of TEMPO were computed with the chemkit `frontier-orbitals` skill at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier `standard`, density-fitted) using PySCF in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2 (doublet). The fixed geometry was taken directly from the provided /home/erobles/.../tempo.xyz file (no re-optimization; DFT//exp-XYZ single-point).

Key results (eV):
• HOMO = −6.3375439  • LUMO = −2.4651235
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV (headline value)

SCF converged in 12 cycles; no warnings were reported by the engine. Integrity check: status ok, trustworthy true.

Live PySCF output was streamed to the .out log file announced at run start; see that file for full SCF details and orbital printout.
